queries.question: Provide all the unaccompanied minors and people requiring tailored assistance that Claire Allen helps.
queries.sql:
SELECT Passengers.FullName
FROM PassengerAssistanceRequests JOIN Assistants ON PassengerAssistanceRequests.AssistantID = Assistants.AssistantID JOIN Passengers ON Passengers.PassengerID = PassengerAssistanceRequests.PassengerID
WHERE (PassengerAssistanceRequests.Type = "Unaccompanied Minor" OR PassengerAssistanceRequests.Type = "Tailored Assistance") AND Assistants.Name = "Claire Allen"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?passengerassistancerequests a :PassengerAssistanceRequests .
  ?assistants a :Assistant .
  ?passengerassistancerequests p:hasAssistants ?assistants .
  ?passengers a :Passengers .
  ?passengerassistancerequests p:hasPassengers ?passengers .
  ?passengers p:name ?fullname .
  ?passengerassistancerequests p:Type ?type_w .
  ?passengerassistancerequests p:Type ?type_w2 .
  ?assistants p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?type_w) = "Unaccompanied Minor" || STR(?type_w2) = "Tailored Assistance")) && STR(?name_w) = "Claire Allen"))
}

PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE attachment {
  high: { SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?passengerassistancerequests a :PassengerAssistanceRequests .
  ?assistants a :Assistant .
  ?passengerassistancerequests p:hasAssistants ?assistants .
  ?passengers a :Passengers .
  ?passengerassistancerequests p:hasPassengers ?passengers .
  ?passengers p:name ?fullname .
  ?passengerassistancerequests p:Type ?type_w .
  ?passengerassistancerequests p:Type ?type_w2 .
  ?assistants p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?type_w) = "Unaccompanied Minor" || STR(?type_w2) = "Tailored Assistance")) && STR(?name_w) = "Claire Allen"))
} }
  low: { SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?passengerassistancerequests a :PassengerAssistanceRequests .
  ?assistants a :Assistant .
  ?passengerassistancerequests p:hasAssistants ?assistants .
  ?passengers a :Passengers .
  ?passengerassistancerequests p:hasPassengers ?passengers .
  ?passengers p:name ?fullname .
  ?passengerassistancerequests p:Type ?type_w .
  ?passengerassistancerequests p:Type ?type_w2 .
  ?assistants p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((STR(?type_w) = "Unaccompanied Minor" || (STR(?type_w2) = "Tailored Assistance" && STR(?name_w) = "Claire Allen")))
} }
}
